statuses.label: Proposed
statuses.publicMeaning: An audit question has been identified but research has not formally begun.

statuses.label: Researching
statuses.publicMeaning: Evidence collection and analysis are active.

statuses.label: Evidence incomplete
statuses.publicMeaning: The audit cannot proceed because required evidence is missing.

statuses.label: Internal review
statuses.publicMeaning: The analysis is complete and undergoing verification.

statuses.label: Open for challenge
statuses.publicMeaning: A review version is available for external challenge.

statuses.label: Published with limitations
statuses.publicMeaning: The audit passed publication gates, but material limitations remain visible.

statuses.label: Published
statuses.publicMeaning: The audit passed applicable publication gates.

statuses.label: Correction pending
statuses.publicMeaning: A credible issue has been identified and is under review.

statuses.label: Corrected
statuses.publicMeaning: A published record changed through a correction record.

statuses.label: Superseded
statuses.publicMeaning: A newer release or audit replaces this record.

statuses.label: Withdrawn
statuses.publicMeaning: The publication is no longer reliable enough to remain an active finding.
